race.name: Human
race.characteristics: Well-rounded units. Buildings can be built anywhere. Peasants can become Militia at the main Town Hall. Multiple workers can be used to construct buildings faster.

race.name: Night Elf
race.characteristics: Several buildings (called "Ancients") can uproot to move and attack land units. Night elf units have improved vision during nighttime after researching Ultravision. Wisps are immune while harvesting gold and can harvest lumber anywhere without needing to return their resources. Wisps sacrifice themselves when building Ancients.

race.name: Orc
race.characteristics: Very beefy and expensive units. Burrows coupled with Peons are used as a defense. Orc peons are immune while constructing buildings. Several orc units can be upgraded to salvage gold and lumber when attacking enemy buildings.

race.name: Undead
race.characteristics: Can use corpses as a resource. Buildings must be built upon Blight. Acolytes only need to begin a building's summoning. Acolytes can harvest gold at Haunted Gold Mines without returning their resources.
